message:
chore(beads): close franken_numpy-iq7n, -4ln8, -uxm5

Three numpy.fft passthrough wrappers (hfft, rfft2, irfft2) shipped in
commit 59430e9. Joint parity test
`hfft_rfft2_irfft2_match_numpy_across_shapes_axes_norms_and_roundtrip`
covers defaults, explicit n/s/axes, norm='ortho'/'forward', real-dtype
verification, and round-trip recovery. rch test: 1 passed, 0 failed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
